base_size.note: Varies - happiness bar is 120x2px, care buttons are 8x8px each

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Interactive button to feed Echo seeds
context.screen_position: Lower right at x=96px, y=108px when care menu is visible (popup)
context.usage_scenario: Appears when player taps screen to open care menu. Tapping this button fills food bowl with seeds and triggers echo_eating animation. Button grays out during cooldown period. Part of 3-button care menu popup.

visual_specification.shape: Square button 8x8px. Contains seed icon (3x3px) centered inside.
visual_specification.outline: No outline stroke (button defined by background color)

animation.description: 2 states (not animated): Active state: seed icon in #FFA300. Disabled state: seed icon in #5F574F (gray). State changes based on cooldown timer.

visual_specification.details: Button: 8x8px square, #1D2B53 background. Seed icon: 3x3px oval centered at button center (x=98-100px, y=110-112px relative to screen). Active: icon #FFA300. Disabled: icon #5F574F. Position: x=96px, y=108px. Touch target: full 8x8px area.

relationships.shared_with: Part of care menu system with clean and pet buttons
relationships.differences_from: Unlike clean button: seed icon (not broom). Unlike pet button: leftmost position in menu. Unlike happiness bar: interactive button (not display).
